title: Please add time into the deadline column.
excerpt: Our company would really find it useful to be able to assign a time to a task and be able to see at a glance what tasks haven’t been completed at a given time of the day that should have been. Even better would be to ass…

posts.author: dcastel (David Casteel)
posts.cookedHtml: Our company would really find it useful to be able to assign a time to a task and be able to see at a glance what tasks haven’t been completed at a given time of the day that should have been. Even better would be to assign a time frame for a task to be completed such as “2:00pm - 4:00pm”.
